title: Separator Component
content:
## Separator A presentational component used to visually separate content. It wraps the `@radix-ui/react-separator` component, providing custom styling and utility class integration. ### Purpose This component offers a customizable horizontal or vertical line to divide distinct sections of your UI, improving readability and visual hierarchy. ### Key Exports * `Separator`: The main React component. ### Props * `className` (string, optional): Custom CSS classes to apply to the separator. * `orientation` (enum: `'horizontal'` | `'vertical'`, default: `'horizontal'`): The orientation of the separator. * `decorative` (boolean, default: `true`): If `true`, the separator is decorative and not important for screen readers. * `...props`: Any other props accepted by `@radix-ui/react-separator`. ### Usage ```jsx import { Separator } from "@/components/ui/separator"; function MyComponent() { return (

Section 1 Content

Section 2 Content

Left Side

Right Side

); } ```
